page: Microsoft Azure D32ds_v7 is a general-purpose virtual machine belonging to the Ddsv7 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 32 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 16 physical cores of an Intel Xeon 6973P-C processor operating at 4.2 GHz. The x86_64 architecture includes 128 GB of RAM, providing a 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, alongside a 480 MB L3 cache. It is equipped with 1890 GB of local storage and supports Premium Storage. No GPUs are included in this configuration.

Benchmark data indicates strong single-core performance, with stress-ng single-core CPU testing placing in the top 25%, and single-threaded gzip compression and bzip3 decompression reaching the top 10%. Multi-core CPU performance and memory bandwidth fall within the average range. The processor's advanced instruction sets, including AVX-512 and Intel AMX, support cryptography and integer operations, reflected in a strong Passmark CPU encryption score and strong prompt processing speeds for small and medium LLM models.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the D32ds_v7 offers balanced resource density with bundled local NVMe storage, reducing the need for external storage attachments for temporary data. This profile is suitable for workloads such as database operations, static web serving, redis caching, and moderate-scale LLM inference tasks where dedicated compute and high-speed local storage are required.
description: Microsoft Azure D32ds_v7 is a general-purpose virtual machine from the Ddsv7 family, powered by a 32-vCPU Intel Xeon 6973P-C processor running at 4.2 GHz on Microsoft Hyper-V. It features 128 GB of RAM, 1890 GB of local storage, and supports Premium Storage. Built on the x86_64 architecture, it includes advanced instruction sets like AVX-512 and Intel AMX. Benchmarks show strong single-core performance, placing in the top 25% for stress-ng single-core and the top 10% for single-threaded gzip compression. While multi-core performance and memory bandwidth are average, the instance delivers strong results in database operations, static web serving, and small-to-medium LLM prompt processing. This configuration is suitable for database hosting, web serving, and general-purpose enterprise workloads requiring dedicated compute and local storage.
og_description: Microsoft Azure D32ds_v7 is a general-purpose virtual machine featuring 32 vCPUs, 128 GB RAM, and 1890 GB local storage, delivering strong single-core CPU and database performance.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure D32ds_v7 is a general-purpose VM with 32 vCPUs, 128 GB RAM, and 1890 GB local storage, optimized for database and web workloads.
tagline: A balanced general-purpose virtual machine featuring dedicated Intel Xeon processors, high-speed local storage, and strong single-core performance.
bullet_points: Intel Xeon 6973P-C processor with 32 vCPUs and 128 GB RAM
1890 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability
Strong single-core performance and top-tier single-threaded compression speeds
Intel AMX and AVX-512 support for accelerated cryptography and vector operations
Suitable for database operations, static web serving, and redis caching
